title: placeCH - Community Modpack
description:
This is the official Modpack of the Swiss r/place Community!
Our Server supports PlasmoVoice!
Join at mc.r-place.ch or our discord at https://discord.r-place.ch
body:
# The official Modpack of the Swiss r/place community 
Welcome to the official Modpack of the Swiss r/place community!
We're excited to bring you  an enhanced Minecraft experience tailored for our community. Whether you are an experienced player or new to the game, our Modpack offers many exciting features and functions that will enrich your gameplay. 
 

## Modpack features 
Our mod packs are carefully curated to deliver an immersive and enjoyable Minecraft adventure. Here are some of the key features you can expect: 
 
### Better Performance:

We made sure to add some performance oriented mods and use low performance mods to make the mod pack work with every mod. 
 
### PlasmoVoice Integration:

Communication is key and we have integrated PlasmoVoice into our server to ensure smooth and crystal clear voice communication. Effectively coordinate with your friends by starting a joint venture and facing challenges as a team in  group chat. Join us today! 






Are you ready to immerse yourself in the enriched Minecraft experience provided by Modpack? Join our server at mc.r-place.ch and start your adventure in the Swiss r/place community. Immerse yourself in exciting landscapes, connect with other players and show your creativity by building, exploring and conquering. 



### Have questions or want to connect with the community outside of the game?
Join our Discord server at https://discord.r-place.ch to interact with great players, discuss strategies and stay up to date with the latest events, updates and announcements.  We can't wait to see you in game and on Discord. Get ready to embark on an unforgettable Minecraft journey with the Swiss r/place community!
